currentClaim: Threadsmith v0.2.0 release hardening is implemented: public README, release checklist, release notes, package versions, startup copy, app-home front door state, and verification guidance now align with the completed Context OS lane before publishing.

doneWhenChecklist.label: README 清楚区分 v0.2.0 Context OS 当前线与 v0.1.1 稳定发布
v0.2.0 release checklist 存在并包含当前验证命令
v0.2.0 release notes draft 概括 Context OS 能力与边界
公开入口不再只指向 v0.1.1 文档而忽略 v0.2.0
启动文案、app-home 前门和传播草稿不再停留在 v0.1.1 或 release-hardening 进行中状态

knownGaps: multi-provider automation remains out of scope for v0.2.0.
native desktop shell remains out of scope for this release.
GitHub Release publication itself is the next slice after this hardening PR.
